summary.intent: Deprecate the @release-artist Slack handle across all workspace repos, replacing it with @automated-tooling-triage for handle references and 'ART team' for generic team mentions.
summary.outcome: Successfully updated 5 repositories (art-tools, aos-cd-jobs, art-ai-helpers, art-docs, art-dashboard-ui) with 21+ file changes total. Created 4 GitHub PRs; 1 GitLab MR requires manual creation due to auth issues.

repo: Repos have different default branches: art-tools and art-ai-helpers use main, aos-cd-jobs/art-docs/art-dashboard-ui use master
Repos are split across GitHub (openshift-eng org) and GitLab (hybrid-platforms/art)
art-bot repository contains no references to release-artist handle
art-tools has prod remote pointing to openshift-eng/art-tools, not a dev remote as CLAUDE.md suggested

code.finding: RELEASE_ARTIST_HANDLE constant renamed to ART_TRIAGE_HANDLE, value changed from 'release-artists' to 'automated-tooling-triage', affecting multiple pipeline files that import this constant
Multiple GitHub PR template strings contain @release-artists handle that needed updating to @automated-tooling-triage

workflow: Need to distinguish between Slack handle references (@-prefixed) vs generic team name references in comments/docs
Pre-commit hooks can fail in sandbox mode, requiring dangerouslyDisableSandbox: true for git commits
PR titles can be bulk-updated after creation using gh pr edit --title
GitLab MCP tokens can expire; fallback options are glab CLI or manual MR creation

friction: Started in Plan mode when user wanted execution, required explicit mode switch
art-tools pre-commit hook failed due to sandbox permissions on first commit attempt
GitLab MCP token expired for gitlab.cee.redhat.com
glab CLI not authenticated for gitlab.cee.redhat.com, preventing automated MR creation
open_items: art-ai-helpers GitLab MR needs manual creation at https://gitlab.cee.redhat.com/asdas1/art-ai-helpers/-/merge_requests/new with target hybrid-platforms/art/art-ai-helpers:main
create_f2f_tickets.sh in art-tools is untracked and was intentionally skipped from changes
